choices: Eternal thirst while unable to drink
Being eaten by an eagle daily
Being unable to eat or drink while food and water were near

questions.q: What was the name of the magical herb that Hermes gave to Odysseus to protect him from Circe's enchantments?

choices: Thetis; dipping him in the River Styx
Aphrodite; blessing him with divine armor

choices: An eagle eats his liver daily

questions.q: Which mortal woman did Zeus transform into a white heifer to hide from Hera's jealousy?

choices: A foul odor that repelled all men

questions.q: Which Trojan prince was known for his exceptional beauty and was loved by Aphrodite?
